scripts.generate: drizzle-kit generate && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),d='./drizzle';for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d)){if(!f.endsWith('.sql'))continue;const fp=p.join(d,f);const s=fs.readFileSync(fp,'utf8');const o=s.replace(/\"(geography\\([^\"]+\\))\"/g,'$1').replace(/\"(geometry\\([^\"]+\\))\"/g,'$1');if(o!==s){fs.writeFileSync(fp,o);console.log('normalized PostGIS types in',f);}}"
